title: isodon umbrosus var. leucanthus
intro: Isodon umbrosus var. leucanthus, also known as white Isodon, is a variety of the Isodon umbrosus plant, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family of plants. It is a type of perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Isodon umbrosus var. leucanthus can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
